---
title: |
    Some Practical Considerations in Deep Learning and Image Data
subtitle: |
    Transfer learning, data augmentation, and more
---

{{< include ../assets/includes/_colab-link.qmd >}}

::: {.content-hidden}

## Boilerplate preamble for LaTeX macros and Python viz style
$$
{{< include ../assets/includes/_macros.tex >}}
$$

```{python}
import style
```
:::

Consider doing this with something other than images, for example mel spectrogram data. Maybe from [here](https://scottmduda.medium.com/urban-environmental-audio-classification-using-mel-spectrograms-706ee6f8dcc1)? 


```{python}
import sounddata
2+2
```


### Transfer Learning 

### Equivariance and Data Augmentation

### Data Loaders from Directories

### Feature importance for images?
